mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.photo, t.birthday, t.deathday, t.biography, t.story, t.family_id, f.name AS family_name, t.qr_code, t.visit_count, t.message_count, t.create_time FROM tomb t LEFT JOIN family f ON t.family_id = f.id AND f.del_flag = 0
AND t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
AND t.family_id = #{param.familyId}
AND t.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY t.id DESC

SELECT t.id, t.name, t.photo, t.birthday, t.deathday, t.biography, t.story, t.family_id, f.name AS family_name, t.qr_code, t.visit_count, t.message_count, t.create_time FROM tomb t LEFT JOIN family f ON t.family_id = f.id AND f.del_flag = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.del_flag = 0
